requirement_topic.en: Kahramaa Grid Connection — 240 V / 50 Hz and Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 卡赫拉马并网接入——240 V / 50 Hz及项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: 卡赫拉馬併網接入——240 V / 50 Hz及項目驗收

summary.en: Qatar operates on 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz, supplied by Kahramaa (Qatar General Electricity and Water Corporation). Kahramaa became the sole operator and regulator of all EV charging stations in Qatar effective 2022 and requires project-level acceptance for charger installations including supply capacity review, metering, load management, civil and electrical installation approval, commissioning, and network-operation compliance. The Tarsheed Smart EV Charging Programme governs connected public charging points, and chargers must integrate with the Tarsheed platform. DC public fast chargers are rated at 50 kW, 100 kW, and up to 150 kW; AC chargers are rated up to 22 kW for public use and up to 11 kW for residential. Harmonic injection and power-quality limits aligned with IEC standards apply.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔采用240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz电网，由卡赫拉马（卡塔尔通用电力和水务公司）供电。卡赫拉马自2022年起成为卡塔尔所有电动汽车充电站的唯一运营商和监管机构，充电桩安装须经项目级验收，包括供电容量审查、计量、负载管理、土建及电气安装审批、调试和网络运营合规。Tarsheed智慧电动汽车充电计划管辖已接入的公共充电点，充电桩须与Tarsheed平台集成。公共直流快充额定功率为50 kW、100 kW，最高可达150 kW；公共交流充电桩最高22 kW，住宅最高11 kW。谐波注入和电能质量限值须符合IEC标准要求。
summary.zht: 卡塔爾採用240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz電網，由卡赫拉馬（卡塔爾通用電力和水務公司）供電。卡赫拉馬自2022年起成為卡塔爾所有電動汽車充電站的唯一運營商和監管機構，充電樁安裝須經項目級驗收，包括供電容量審查、計量、負載管理、土建及電氣安裝審批、調試和網絡運營合規。Tarsheed智慧電動汽車充電計劃管轄已接入的公共充電點，充電樁須與Tarsheed平台集成。公共直流快充額定功率為50 kW、100 kW，最高可達150 kW；公共交流充電樁最高22 kW，住宅最高11 kW。諧波注入和電能質量限值須符合IEC標準要求。

standards_or_laws: Kahramaa EV Chargers Technical Specifications — Tarsheed programme (km.qa)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Kahramaa installation and connection approval requirements for licensed contractors

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Qatar's 240 V / 415 V supply requires confirmation of input-voltage range, transformer or rectifier ratings, and thermal derating at Qatar ambient temperatures, all of which differ from the China domestic design baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。卡塔尔240 V / 415 V供电要求确认输入电压范围、变压器或整流器额定值，以及在卡塔尔环境温度下的热降额——这些均与中国国内设计基线不同。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。卡塔爾240 V / 415 V供電要求確認輸入電壓範圍、變壓器或整流器額定值，以及在卡塔爾環境溫度下的熱降額——這些均與中國國內設計基線不同。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range and rated voltage of the charger covers 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) power electronics and thermal design are derated for Qatar ambient (up to 50 °C outdoor, sustained 45 °C+); (3) the charger integrates with the Tarsheed OCPP-based management platform; (4) installation by a Kahramaa-licensed contractor; (5) single-line diagram, load calculations, metering, harmonic data, and commissioning documentation prepared for Kahramaa project acceptance. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design without voltage-range confirmation is not grid-ready for Qatar.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围和额定电压覆盖240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 电力电子和热设计针对卡塔尔环境（室外最高50°C，持续45°C以上）进行了降额；(3) 充电桩与Tarsheed基于OCPP的管理平台集成；(4) 由卡赫拉马授权承包商安装；(5) 准备单线图、负荷计算、计量、谐波数据和调试文件以供卡赫拉马项目验收。未确认电压范围的中国国内220 V / 380 V设计不满足卡塔尔并网要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍和額定電壓覆蓋240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 電力電子和熱設計針對卡塔爾環境（室外最高50°C，持續45°C以上）進行了降額；(3) 充電樁與Tarsheed基於OCPP的管理平台集成；(4) 由卡赫拉馬授權承包商安裝；(5) 準備單線圖、負荷計算、計量、諧波數據和調試文件以供卡赫拉馬項目驗收。未確認電壓範圍的中國國內220 V / 380 V設計不滿足卡塔爾併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Kahramaa is the sole operator and regulator of Qatar EV charging; all grid-connected installations require Kahramaa project acceptance, licensed contractor installation, and Tarsheed platform integration for public chargers
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Kahramaa approval substitute; voltage and thermal ratings must be re-confirmed for Qatar conditions

source.publisher: Kahramaa — Qatar General Electricity and Water Corporation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Qatar-ready charger package needs product evidence, grid-voltage and thermal derating confirmation, Tarsheed platform integration, and Kahramaa project-acceptance documentation. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design without input-range confirmation is not Qatar grid-ready.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向卡塔尔的充电桩资料包须包括产品证据、电网电压和热降额确认、Tarsheed平台集成，以及卡赫拉马项目验收文件。未确认输入范围的中国国内220 V / 380 V设计不满足卡塔尔并网要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向卡塔爾的充電樁資料包須包括產品證據、電網電壓和熱降額確認、Tarsheed平台集成，以及卡赫拉馬項目驗收文件。未確認輸入範圍的中國國內220 V / 380 V設計不滿足卡塔爾併網要求。
